name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Reservations Administrator Role Assigned To A User
description: This model detects successful assignment of over-privileged Azure IAM Reservations Administrator role to a user which may indicate an attacker trying to escalate privileges to manage Azure reservations and assign roles, enabling broader control over the environment to further compromise it.

rules.name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Reservations Administrator Role Assigned To A User

author: Yash Verma and Srivathsa H S
